tasks.title: Set up project scaffolding and database migrations
tasks.description: Create the initial project structure and implement database migrations for new tables and columns required by the payment orchestration layer.
tasks.details:
- Set up project structure for the payment orchestration service
- Create database migration scripts for new tables: payment_provider_config, platform_settlement, platform_invoice
- Add new columns to payment_transaction: settlement_batch_id, platform_invoice_id, manual_payment_reference
- Create membership_plan and membership_subscription tables
- Implement indexes as described in the master PRD
- Migrate legacy event_ticket_transaction data into payment_transaction
- Backfill payment_provider_config for existing tenants with Stripe configs
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all tables are created with correct schema. Run test queries to ensure data integrity and proper relationships between tables.

tasks.title: Implement PaymentService interface and core orchestration layer
tasks.description: Create the core payment service interface that all provider adapters will implement, along with the orchestration layer that routes payment requests.
tasks.details:
- Define PaymentService interface with methods: initialize, confirm, cancel, refund, webhook handling, supportedMethods
- Implement the payment orchestration service as the entry point for all payment operations
- Create provider selection logic based on tenant configuration
- Implement fallback ordering mechanism
- Build configuration layer to access payment_provider_config settings
- Create secure credential storage with AES-256-GCM encryption
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test the orchestration layer with mock providers to ensure proper routing of requests based on tenant configuration.

tasks.title: Implement StripePaymentAdapter
tasks.description: Refactor the Stripe adapter to support PaymentIntent, Checkout Session, and Instant Checkout with multi-tenant configuration.
tasks.details:
- Implement StripePaymentAdapter with PaymentIntent creation
- Add support for Checkout Sessions
- Implement Link/Wallet support
- Add multi-tenant configuration
- Support Stripe Billing for subscriptions
- Implement webhook handling for payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.payment_failed, checkout.session.completed events
- Add support for refund events
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test the adapter with Stripe test mode. Verify all payment flows and webhook handling work correctly.

tasks.title: Implement PayPalPaymentAdapter
tasks.description: Create the PayPal adapter using the Orders API with support for capture, refund, and webhook validation.
tasks.details:
- Implement PayPalPaymentAdapter using the Orders API
- Add support for capture and refund operations
- Implement webhook validation
- Handle capture/void notifications
- Store PayPal-specific transaction details
tasks.testStrategy: Test the adapter with PayPal sandbox environment. Verify order creation, capture, and webhook processing.

tasks.title: Implement ZeffyPaymentAdapter
tasks.description: Create the Zeffy adapter for donation API integration with fallback instructions.
tasks.details:
- Implement ZeffyPaymentAdapter for donation API integration
- Create fallback instructions mechanism if Zeffy is unavailable
- Add support for importing payout CSV or processing webhooks
- Implement helper endpoint for returning Zeffy campaign info/embedded URL
tasks.testStrategy: Test the adapter with Zeffy test environment if available. Verify donation flow and CSV import functionality.

tasks.title: Implement ZelleManualAdapter
tasks.description: Create the Zelle manual adapter for handling pending transactions and admin confirmation endpoints.
tasks.details:
- Implement ZelleManualAdapter for creating pending transactions
- Create admin confirmation endpoints
- Store payer email, expected amount, and memo instructions
- Implement POST /api/payments/zelle/manual endpoint
tasks.testStrategy: Test the creation of pending transactions and the admin confirmation flow. Verify transaction status updates correctly.

tasks.title: Implement RevolutPaymentAdapter
tasks.description: Create the Revolut adapter for card sessions with support for redirect-based SCA and settlement webhooks.
tasks.details:
- Implement RevolutPaymentAdapter for creating card sessions
- Add support for redirect-based Strong Customer Authentication (SCA)
- Process settlement webhooks
- Handle payment_succeeded, payment_failed, settlement_created events
tasks.testStrategy: Test the adapter with Revolut test environment. Verify card session creation, SCA flow, and webhook processing.

tasks.title: Implement CeFiCharityAdapter
tasks.description: Create the CeFi charity adapter for integrating with partner ACH/transfer providers and fetching settlement files.
tasks.details:
- Implement CeFiCharityAdapter for partner ACH/transfer integration
- Create mechanism for fetching settlement files
- Support DONATION_CEFI payment type
- Process settlement data into payment_transaction records
tasks.testStrategy: Test the adapter with mock settlement files. Verify transaction creation and settlement processing.

tasks.title: Implement payment initialization endpoint
tasks.description: Create the main payment initialization endpoint that returns provider-neutral session details.
tasks.details:
- Implement POST /api/payments/initialize endpoint
- Return PaymentSessionResponse with provider hint, clientSecret/sessionUrl, publishable key
- Support payment types: TICKET_SALE, DONATION, DONATION_CEFI, OFFERING, MEMBERSHIP_SUBSCRIPTION
- Route to appropriate provider adapter based on tenant configuration
- Derive schema from Swagger API docs
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with different payment types and tenant configurations. Verify correct provider selection and response format.

tasks.title: Implement payment status endpoint
tasks.description: Create the endpoint for fetching payment status, used for polling by the frontend for Revolut/Zelle pending flows.
tasks.details:
- Implement GET /api/payments/{transactionId} endpoint
- Expose payment method details, settlement info, failure reasons
- Support polling for pending transactions
- Retrieve status from appropriate provider adapter
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with different transaction states. Verify status updates correctly for pending transactions.

tasks.title: Implement refund endpoint
tasks.description: Create the endpoint for issuing full/partial refunds through the respective adapter.
tasks.details:
- Implement POST /api/payments/{transactionId}/refund endpoint
- Support full and partial refunds
- Route to appropriate provider adapter based on original payment method
- Log refund metadata in payment_transaction
- Handle provider-specific refund requirements
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with different providers. Verify refund processing and transaction status updates.

tasks.title: Implement ACP endpoints
tasks.description: Implement Stripe Instant Checkout (ACP) endpoints with feature flag support.
tasks.details:
- Implement POST /api/payments/providers/stripe/instant-checkout endpoint
- Create ACP REST endpoints according to Stripe spec (Create/Update/Complete/Cancel checkout)
- Wrap existing Stripe PaymentIntent creation inside CompleteCheckout handler
- Gate endpoints behind supports_acp flag in payment_provider_config
- Implement fallback to standard PaymentIntent if feature disabled
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoints with the supports_acp flag enabled and disabled. Verify ACP session creation and fallback mechanism.

tasks.title: Implement webhook processing endpoints
tasks.description: Create webhook endpoints for all payment providers with proper signature verification and idempotent processing.
tasks.details:
- Implement /api/webhooks/stripe endpoint for Stripe events
- Implement /api/webhooks/paypal endpoint for PayPal events
- Add webhook support for Zeffy if provided
- Implement webhook endpoint for Revolut events
- Add signature verification for all webhooks
- Implement rate-limiting for webhook requests
- Log all webhook payloads in payment_webhook_log
- Ensure idempotent processing of webhook events
tasks.testStrategy: Test webhook endpoints with sample payloads from each provider. Verify signature verification, idempotency, and event processing.

tasks.title: Implement settlement and fee calculation job
tasks.description: Create the nightly job that aggregates transactions, creates settlement entries, and generates invoices for platform fees.
tasks.details:
- Implement nightly job to aggregate transactions
- Create platform_settlement entries with gross, processing fee, platform fee, net
- Handle application fee collection for providers that support it (Stripe Connect)
- Generate platform_invoice for fees that aren't auto-deducted
- Implement fee calculation logic based on provider and transaction type
tasks.testStrategy: Test the job with sample transaction data. Verify settlement calculations, invoice generation, and proper handling of different fee structures.

tasks.title: Implement finance admin APIs
tasks.description: Create admin APIs for reporting settlements and invoices, and for triggering auto-debit for outstanding invoices.
tasks.details:
- Implement GET /api/finance/settlements endpoint for reporting
- Implement GET /api/finance/invoices endpoint for invoice listing
- Create POST /api/finance/invoices/{id}/charge endpoint to trigger auto-debit
- Add support for Stripe Billing/ACH for invoice charging
- Implement proper authentication and authorization for admin endpoints
- Log all admin actions related to settlements/invoices
tasks.testStrategy: Test admin APIs with different user roles. Verify proper authorization, data retrieval, and invoice charging functionality.

tasks.title: Update API documentation
tasks.description: Update Swagger documentation for all new endpoints and response structures.
tasks.details:
- Update Swagger API docs for payment initialization endpoint
- Document payment status and refund endpoints
- Add documentation for ACP endpoints
- Document webhook endpoints
- Add documentation for finance admin APIs
- Ensure all response structures are properly defined
- Include example requests and responses
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the Swagger documentation accurately reflects the implemented endpoints. Test the documentation with Swagger UI.

tasks.title: Implement comprehensive testing suite
tasks.description: Create unit tests, integration tests, contract tests, and end-to-end tests for all payment flows.
tasks.details:
- Create unit tests for each provider adapter
- Implement integration tests for payment initialization covering all providers
- Add contract tests using Swagger schema
- Create end-to-end tests for Stripe and PayPal flows in staging
- Implement tests for the settlement job
- Add tests for webhook processing
- Create tests for admin finance APIs
tasks.testStrategy: Run the full test suite and verify all payment flows work correctly. Ensure test coverage for edge cases and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement security measures
tasks.description: Implement security features for credential storage, webhook verification, and admin action logging.
tasks.details:
- Implement AES-256-GCM encryption for provider credentials
- Add key rotation mechanism for encryption keys
- Enhance webhook signature verification
- Implement rate limiting for all API endpoints
- Add comprehensive logging for admin actions
- Ensure PCI compliance by avoiding raw card data storage
tasks.testStrategy: Test encryption implementation, key rotation, webhook signature verification, and rate limiting. Verify logging of admin actions.
